title: Spear Plugin
description: A plugin that allows the spear to be used in versions prior to 1.21.11
body:
# ❌ Project Archived

👋 Hello everyone ! This project is **archived** !

👉 To **continue to use** *Spear Plugin*, use [this source code to countinue](https://github.com/Isax820/Spear-Plugin)

🥹 I'm sorry !

---

# 🖥️ Platforms

[![Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/paper_vector.svg)](https://papermc.io)
[![Purpur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/purpur_vector.svg)](https://purpurmc.org)
[![Bukkit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/bukkit_vector.svg)](https://dev.bukkit.org/)
[![Spigot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/spigot_vector.svg)](https://www.spigotmc.org/)
[![BungeeCord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/bungeecord_vector.svg)](https://www.spigotmc.org/wiki/bungeecord/)

---

# 🗡️ Spear Plugin 🗡️

Spear Plugin finally brings the spear into Minecraft!
Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.19 to 1.21.10, this plugin adds a new balanced and immersive weapon, perfect for both close and mid-range combat.

# ⚔️ Features:

- ⚔️ New weapon: Spear

- ⌛ Longer reach than a sword

- ⭐ Ability to throw the spear to deal ranged damage

- 🛠️ Mechanics designed to stay close to the vanilla Minecraft experience

- 🌳 Ideal for PvP and PvE

- 🤩 Easy to configure and performance-friendly

---

# 🌍 Compatibility:

- ⛏️ Minecraft 1.19 → 1.21.10

- 🎮 Works on Spigot / Paper / Purpur servers

---

💖 Add a new dimension to combat and give your players a fresh, strategic, and fun weapon with Spear Plugin !
